name: Productiv SaaS Intelligence API
what_it_does: SaaS intelligence platform with REST API — measuring actual application engagement (not just login activity) through deep usage analytics, providing license optimization recommendations based on feature-level usage data, benchmarking app engagement against industry peers, and tracking SaaS portfolio ROI for IT and finance teams.
use_cases: Querying feature-level SaaS usage data to identify truly unused vs underused licenses
Pulling engagement benchmarks comparing your team's app usage to industry peers
Integrating Productiv usage data with HRIS for employee-level license management
Monitoring SaaS adoption trends post-rollout for change management
Automating license reclamation based on engagement score thresholds
not_for: Cloud IaaS cost optimization (use Vantage or CloudCheckr)
Shadow IT discovery without SSO coverage (limited without deep integrations)
Contract management and renewal negotiation (use Zylo or Vendr)
best_when: An enterprise IT or finance team wants deep, feature-level SaaS usage analytics (not just logins) to make accurate license optimization decisions and benchmark software ROI against industry peers.
avoid_when: You need shadow IT discovery, renewal management, or IT workflow automation rather than deep usage analytics.

auth.notes: API key from Productiv account. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. No webhooks. Deep usage analytics requires Productiv connectors to applications (native integrations per app). HRIS integration for employee data. SSO for identity mapping.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing per employee; contact sales
pricing.notes: Palo Alto-based company. Founded 2018. Raised $50M+ Series C (2022). Backed by Andreessen Horowitz, Accel. Feature-level usage analytics differentiator — knows if users use specific features, not just if they log in. Industry peer benchmarking unique feature. SaaS Savings Network for spend benchmarking. Strong in Fortune 500 IT organizations.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for usage analytics, license data, and benchmarks. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. Deep usage analytics requires per-application native connectors — setup intensive. Benchmarking data based on anonymized network. Feature-level granularity varies by application connector.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Usage reads fully idempotent. License reads idempotent. Benchmark reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Native connectors required per application for feature-level analytics
Setup time significant — each application requires individual connector configuration
Benchmarking uses anonymized Productiv network data — not external public benchmarks
HRIS integration required for employee-level license attribution
Enterprise-only with annual contract — significant upfront commitment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Employee-level usage data is sensitive HR/behavioral PII — restrict access. Application connector credentials require secure storage per integration. A16Z backing brings enterprise security expectations.
